# Lonafarnib 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Lonafarnib 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Lonafarnib</strong> 目前有 <strong>4 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Lonafarnib 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Zokinvy is indicated for the treatment of patients 12 months of age and older with a genetically confirmed diagnosis of Hutchinson-Gilford progeria syndrome or a processing-deficient progeroid...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>leprosy（99.1%）</li>
<li>rheumatoid arthritis（98.8%）</li>
<li>Prinzmetal angina（98.6%）</li>
<li>homozygous familial hypercholesterolemia（98.3%）</li>
<li>hyperthyroidism（98.2%）</li>
<li>pulmonary hypertension（98.2%）</li>
<li>brachydactyly-syndactyly syndrome（98.1%）</li>
<li>nephrogenic syndrome of inappropriate antidiuresis（98.0%）</li>
<li>kyphoscoliotic heart disease（98.0%）</li>
<li>colobomatous microphthalmia-rhizomelic dysplasia syndrome（98.0%）</li>
<li>resistance to thyroid hormone due to a mutation in thyroid hormone receptor beta（97.8%）</li>
<li class="indication-matched">heart disease（97.8%）<span class="indication-tag">📰 Herzerkrankung</span></li>
<li>multiple endocrine neoplasia（97.7%）</li>
<li>Laubry-Pezzi syndrome（97.7%）</li>
<li>Pierre Robin syndrome associated with a chromosomal anomaly（97.6%）</li>
<li>Jeune syndrome situs inversus（97.6%）</li>
<li>genetic syndromic Pierre Robin syndrome（97.6%）</li>
<li>orofacial clefting syndrome（97.6%）</li>
<li>partial deletion of the long arm of chromosome 7（97.5%）</li>
<li>disorder of fucoglycosan synthesis（97.5%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/lonafarnib/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
